heroTitle: Automate Customer Support with SOP-Driven AI
heroSubtitle: Upload your Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and let our AI agent resolve customer inquiries, troubleshoot issues, and handle support tickets autonomously.
heroImageAlt: A customer service representative answering calls
howItWorks: Automated, Compliant, and Built to Scale
howItWorksSubtitle: The platform automates support queues by answering queries using your business policies, while escalating complex cases when needed.
smartMatchingDesc: The AI agent strictly follows your uploaded Standard Operating Procedures, ensuring consistent and policy-compliant responses.
automatedOutreachDesc: Automatically detects and groups customer intents, routing them to the correct retrieval or resolution workflows.
trackProgressDesc: Seamlessly resolves common issues or escalates complex cases to human agents based on your custom escalation rules.
copyright: (c) 2026 AI Customer Support Agent. All rights reserved.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
signupSubtitle: Create an account to get started
loginDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
signupSuccessDesc: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
dashboardSubtitle: Welcome to your business dashboard! Here you can manage your subscription, view and receive referrals from your clients, and track your business growth.
selectConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting
businessSettingsDesc: Configure your AI Customer Service Agent details, tone, and escalation rules.
saveSuccessDesc: Your AI agent configuration has been updated successfully.
